nasb.text: And take the helmet of salvation, and the sword of the Spirit, which is the word of God.

esv.text: and take the helmet of salvation, and the sword of the Spirit, which is the word of God,

cnv.text: 並且要戴上救恩的頭盔，拿起聖靈的寶劍，就是　神的道，

ccb.text: 要戴上救恩的头盔，紧握圣灵的宝剑——上帝的话。

csbs.text: 并且要接受救恩的头盔和圣灵的宝剑——就是神的话语。
